languages.text: Вы велели меровцам самим назначить губернатора Заркова.

traits.locale_text: Вы велели меровцам самим назначить губернатора Заркова.

languages.text: You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.
languages.original_text: Вы велели меровцам самим назначить губернатора Заркова.

traits.locale_text: You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.

You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.

languages.text: Ordenaste a los merovianos que eligieran ellos un gobernador para Zarkov.
languages.original_text: You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.

traits.locale_text: Ordenaste a los merovianos que eligieran ellos un gobernador para Zarkov.

languages.text: 你命令梅罗夫人自行选出扎尔科夫的总督。
languages.original_text: You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.

traits.locale_text: 你命令梅罗夫人自行选出扎尔科夫的总督。

languages.text: Vous avez ordonné aux Méroviens de nommer eux-mêmes le gouverneur de Zarkov.
languages.original_text: You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez ordonné aux Méroviens de nommer eux-mêmes le gouverneur de Zarkov.

languages.text: Merovlulara Zarkov valisini kendilerinin tayin etmelerini emrettin.
languages.original_text: You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.

traits.locale_text: Merovlulara Zarkov valisini kendilerinin tayin etmelerini emrettin.

languages.text: あなたは、メロヴィアンにザルコフの知事を自ら任命するよう命じた。
languages.original_text: You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.

traits.locale_text: あなたは、メロヴィアンにザルコフの知事を自ら任命するよう命じた。

languages.text: Du hast den Merovianern befohlen, den Gouverneur von Zarkov selbst zu ernennen.
languages.original_text: You ordered the Merovians to appoint the governor of Zarkov themselves.

traits.locale_text: Du hast den Merovianern befohlen, den Gouverneur von Zarkov selbst zu ernennen.
